title: Buckle latch for a seat belt
abstract: A buckle latch for a seat belt, in particular a seat belt of a motor vehicle, wherein the buckle latch has a core made from a metal material, wherein the core is completely surrounded by a casing made from a plastic.
claims: Claims A buckle latch for a seatbelt, in particular a seatbelt of a vehicle, characterized in that the buckle latch (10, 10') has a core (12, 12') made from a metal material, wherein the core (12, 12') is completely surrounded by a casing (14, 14') made from a plastic. The buckle latch for a seatbelt as claimed in claim 1, characterized in that the casing (14, 14') has been injection-molded onto the core (12, 12') in a plastics injection molding process. The buckle latch as claimed in either of claims 1 and 2, characterized in that the core (12, 12') is formed from a metal sheet. The buckle latch as claimed in either of claims 1 and 2, characterized in that the core (12, 12') is formed from a metal wire. The buckle latch as claimed in claim 4, characterized in that the ends (24, 26) of the metal wire are connected to each other in a form-fitting manner. The buckle latch as claimed in claim 4, characterized in that the ends (24, 26) of the metal wire are connected to each other in an integrally bonded manner. A seatbelt, in particular seatbelt of a vehicle, comprising a buckle latch (10, 10') as claimed in one of the preceding claims and a belt buckle with a locking receptacle for the releasably locking reception of the buckle latch (10, 10'). A seatbelt of a vehicle, comprising a buckle latch (10, 10') as claimed in one of the preceding claims and a belt strap passing through a strap opening of the buckle latch.
